title: PM Domain P6 Integration Boundary Spec
objective: Define the exact boundary between PM/work entities and P6 integration semantics, including imported IDs, sync ledgers, XER flows, hierarchy support, and which concepts belong in work versus integration.
constrained_outputs: One P6 integration boundary document under c:/APEX Platform/Platform-Authority
Explicit statement of work-domain versus integration-domain ownership
validation_steps: Confirm P6 IDs are external bindings rather than primary business identity
Confirm WBS assists planning but does not outrank WorkPackage
Confirm sync logging is treated as integration ledger behavior
